explanation: The user wants all potatoes to be placed in a cabinet. Since the robot can only hold one object at a time, it must pick up each potato individually. Before placing each potato in the cabinet, the cabinet must be opened. After all potatoes are placed, the cabinet is closed to keep the items secure. The suffix _0, _1, _2 is used for the potatoes as they are new objects and not referenced in the discussed_objects list.
